text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O and I are heading back<n>to the
academy. The sun starts to set<n>as the dorm
curfew draws nearer.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: No! Sweet mother of mercy!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
To have forgotten something so vital...<n>This is most
unbecoming of the<n>Overlord!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I've forgotten an essential piece of<n>the living
masterpiece that is I!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I didn't purchase rose petals to set<n>afloat in the
bathtub!
choice_data_list: It's almost curfew. Can't it wait till tomorrow?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: NO! With every ounce of my being,no!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What unforgivable folly it would be to<n>deliberately
neglect my radiant shine!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now that you understand the direness<n>of my
predicament, you can<n>accompany me to purchase
said<n>roses.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Think of those precious petals,<n>earnestly waiting
to share a frolicking<n>moment with me in the
tub—now<n>wallowing in the despair that I have<n>yet
to claim them.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I must go this instant and rescue<n>them from their
anguish!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Make haste!
choice_data_list: We'll have time if we hurry!
We'll have time if we hurry!
No. It's best for you to follow curfew.
No. It's best for you to follow curfew.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Make haste!
choice_data_list: We'll have time if we hurry!
We'll have time if we hurry!
No. It's best for you to follow curfew.
No. It's best for you to follow curfew.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I make her promise she'll return to<n>the academy
by curfew, and we head<n>to her usual shop.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: And then...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Five minutes before curfew... And the<n>roses are
safely in my loving<n>embrace.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! The Overlord keeps her word!<n>Have I
inspired you once more?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
That I am as great and beautiful as I<n>am noble?
Mediocre! Those traits<n>should be more than
obvious to you<n>by this point!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oh yes! I should offer my thanks for
accompanying me. Here, a rose for<n>you.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Were you aware, Trainer? Roses<n>carry with them
two special<n>meanings...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Keep heart and "you shall return with<n>hope."

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Wouldn't you agree those words<n>perfectly
describe us this night?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oh? You don't seem so sure. I was<n>certain that
revelation would have you<n>in tears...
Gah! Are you implying what I believe<n>you are?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You are already content, because the<n>hope you've
gained is no other than<n>I!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Touché, Trainer! You got me that time!<n>Haaah ha
ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
With T.M. Opera O in high spirits, I see<n>her off and
return home.
Hm? What do you mean?
choice_data_list:
Break curfew and you're in for a lecture late into
the night.

Break curfew and you're in for a lecture late into
the night.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I tell her that no amount of roses will<n>ever make
up for a lack of beauty<n>sleep.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: What?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: This is terrible!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Alas, I had forgotten something so<n>basic!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Limbs with the sheen of icefish! Skin<n>soft as silk!
The beautiful and<n>handsome Overlord!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
All of that preserved through leading<n>a proper
lifestyle, and yet, here I am...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, Trainer, for reminding me<n>of this very
important truth.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
My heart aches for those poor roses<n>who, alas,
must be left to wait in vain.<n>They shall receive my
full affection<n>tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Tonight will be a night to turn in early.<n>That goes
for you as well.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. Take this advice from me, as<n>an
expression of my gratitude!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: For I shall meet you in your dreams,<n>Trainer...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And we will have a dance party, in the<n>rose-filled
courtyard of a beautiful<n>castle beneath the stars!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I imagine the elaborate scene she's<n>described.
Some interesting dreams<n>are bound to visit me
tonight.
